title: Cloud Guard Instance Security: Findings by Host
description: Ranks Cloud Guard Instance Security findings by host and OCI compute instance.
query: 'Log Source' = 'SOC Cloud Guard Instance Security Logs' | stats count as Findings, unique('Finding Name') as FindingNames, unique('Pack Name') as Packs by 'Host Name', 'Instance OCID', 'Finding Severity' | sort -Findings

candidates: SOC Cloud Guard Instance Security Logs
